business_type: Independent podcaster producing a weekly interview show on entrepreneurship, technology, and personal growth
current_role: Host, producer, editor coordinator, and audience growth lead (owner-operator)
weekly_tasks_text: Research potential guests and topics; send guest outreach emails and follow-ups; schedule recording sessions; prepare interview questions and episode outlines; record weekly podcast episodes; review transcripts and pull key highlights; coordinate audio/video editing; write episode titles, descriptions, and show notes; create short clips for LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, and TikTok; publish episodes to podcast platforms and promote them on social media.
current_tools_text: Gmail, Google Calendar, Calendly for scheduling, Zoom or Riverside for recording, Descript for editing, Spotify for Podcasters, YouTube, Google Docs, Notion for show planning, Canva for visuals, LinkedIn / Instagram / TikTok for distribution.
top_time_sinks_text: Finding and researching good guests; writing personalized outreach messages; preparing strong interview questions; turning long episodes into short clips and posts; writing show notes and episode descriptions; remembering guest follow-ups and publishing deadlines.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Guest names, titles, and company details; episode release dates; attribution for quotes or claims; sponsor mentions; copyrighted music or media; sensitive guest statements that should be reviewed before publishing.
customer_facing_areas_text: Guest outreach emails; guest scheduling and reminders; episode descriptions and show notes; social media posts; newsletter updates; sponsor mentions; audience comments and replies.
primary_goal_text: Increase consistency and audience growth by reducing production workload and turning each episode into more reusable content assets.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Final guest selection; final approval of episode titles; sensitive editing decisions; sponsor relationship communication; personal replies to important guests or listeners.
